page_title: Wage overtime and meal break law — New Hampshire
meta_title: New Hampshire Wage, Overtime and Meal Break Law 2026 | Teamed
meta_description: NH minimum wage $7.25/hr (federal floor, RSA 279). FLSA 40-hr OT threshold. 30-min meal break required for shifts over 5 consecutive hours (RSA 275:30-a). Final pay within 72 hours on involuntary dismissal (RSA 275:44).

hero_image.alt: Autumn forest trail in New Hampshire's White Mountains national forest.

compliance_sources.fact: New Hampshire minimum wage tied to federal FLSA floor — $7.25/hr in 2026
Federal minimum wage $7.25/hr; tipped minimum $2.13/hr federal (NH tipped rate $3.26/hr)
30-minute meal break required for shifts over 5 consecutive hours; unpaid if fully relieved; exception for eating-while-working by agreement
Regular payday requirement; wages paid no less than weekly, bi-weekly, or semi-monthly
Final wages due within 72 hours of involuntary dismissal; next regular payday on voluntary resignation
40-hour weekly threshold; 1.5x regular rate; no state daily OT in NH

partner_note: NH EOR runs through Suna Solutions, Inc. (primary US partner). No direct Teamed legal entity in the US.
information_gain_angle: NH has no state minimum above federal floor and no state OT law beyond FLSA — unusually clean for multi-state payroll. Key differentiators: (1) no daily OT makes 4x10 schedules viable without premium; (2) RSA 275:30-a eating-while-working exception is real but narrow — NH DOL applies it narrowly; (3) 72-hour final-pay rule on involuntary dismissal is stricter than most US states; (4) monthly pay frequency not compliant under RSA 275:43.
audit_flag_detail: $7.25 minimum wage as NH state rate — tracks federal floor via RSA 279; provisional pending federal minimum wage stability
$3.26 tipped rate — provisional; confirm against current NH DOL tipped-credit schedule
FLSA exempt salary threshold $684/week cited — provisional; DOL 2024 rule subject to legal challenge; re-verify before each payroll year
RSA 275:30-a eating-while-working exception scope — provisional; based on statutory text reading and NH DOL enforcement position
RSA 275:43 monthly pay disallowed interpretation — provisional; based on plain reading of pay-frequency statute
